author: maxine--basel
content: Render flow now: (1) generate SVGs into docs_src/, (2) quarto renders to .docs_build/ temp dir via QUARTO_PROJECT_OUTPUT_DIR override, (3) collision check scans temp output against docs/ for files with no docs_src/ source (protects api.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, ELI5.md), (4) rsync with --filter='protect *.md' copies to docs/ preserving manual files, (5) --force flag overrides collisions, (6) verify step gates output. Added .docs_build/ to .gitignore and scripts/** to docs.yml triggers.
